## Summary

- Describe the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Home Assistant integration behavior
- [ ] Documentation, issue templates, or repository maintenance
- [ ] Requires a `salus-it600-client` change or release

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I linked the related issue or explained why there is none.
- [ ] I kept gateway protocol parsing and low-level commands in `salus-it600-client`.
- [ ] I updated translations for user-facing strings.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] I ran relevant local checks, or this is documentation/template-only.
- [ ] I considered whether real-gateway validation is needed.
